html:
Ashes are an Item dropped after a flammable object has been burnt by Fire (some exceptions such as Trees), including the remnants of a Campfire and a destroyed Pig Torch or Fire Pit. Ashes will also replace any item that is not allowed to be carried through to the next World via the Teleportato (e.g. the Eye Bone or Webber's Skull). Ashes are also an ingredient for crafting Healing Salve. Moleworms will take them like minerals such as rocks or flint.

Mobs that are killed by fire will drop Ashes in place of any flammable item in their loot table or the cooked version of their Meats. Red Hounds always drop 3 Ashes when killed. Ashes are blown away by the wind after being on the ground for 20 seconds (picking it up and then dropping it again resets the timer). Burning a stack of items will yield the same amount of Ashes. For example, burning 40 Twigs will result in 40 Ashes.

Downloadable Content

In the Reign of Giants DLC, the Dragonfly will burn any flammable objects to turn them into Ashes to eat. After eating 20 Ashes, she will fall asleep.

In the Shipwrecked DLC, Ashes can be obtained when Ash Trees are chopped in the Volcano or when a Lava Pool is allowed to extinguish naturally. Ashes are required to fertilize Coffee Plants and Elephant Cacti. Additionally, any flammable items put inside of fire Packim Baggims will be turned into Ashes upon closing and opening it again.

In the Hamlet DLC, Ashes are required to craft Cultivated Turf and Dense Turf.

Usage

×2

×2

Tips

  • Due to their abundance and minimal use, Pine Cones and Jungle Tree Seeds are good candidates to burn and get Ashes.
  • In DST, they can be farmed by setting a Mush Gnome on fire where it will spawn multiple Lunar Spores that will quickly burn and turn into Ashes.

Assets

  • eaten
  • disappear

Gallery

  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

–Wilson

–Willow

–Wickerbottom

“Pile of burny bits.”
–Wurt
“Did someone have a campfire without me?”
–Walter
“What a mess.”
–Wanda

Ashes will also replace any item that is not allowed to be carried through to the next [[World]] via the [[Wooden Thing|Teleportato]] (e.g. the [[Eye Bone]] or [[Webber's Skull]]). [[Mobs]] that are killed by fire will drop Ashes in place of any flammable item in their loot table or the cooked version of their [[Meats]]. [[Red Hound]]s always drop 3 Ashes when killed. For example, burning 40 [[Twigs]] will result in 40 Ashes. __NOTOC__ ==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content== In the ''[[Don't Starve: Reign of Giants|Reign of Giants]]'' DLC, the [[Dragonfly]] will burn any flammable objects to turn them into Ashes to eat. After eating 20 Ashes, she will fall asleep. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC, Ashes can be obtained when [[Ash Tree]]s are chopped in the [[Volcano]] or when a [[Lava Pool]] is allowed to extinguish naturally. Ashes are required to fertilize [[Coffee Plant]]s and [[Elephant Cactus|Elephant Cacti]]. Additionally, any [[:Category:Flammable Objects|flammable]] items put inside of fire [[Packim Baggims]] will be turned into Ashes upon closing and opening it again. In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, Ashes are required to craft [[Cultivated Turf]] and [[Dense Turf]]. == {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Ashes |count1 = 2 |item2 = Spider Gland |item3 = Rocks |tool = Science Machine |result = Healing Salve}} {{Recipe |item1 = Ashes |item2 = Rainforest Turf |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Cultivated Turf |dlc = Hamlet}} {{Recipe |item1=Ashes |item2 = Bramble Bulb |item3 = Cut Grass |count3 = 2 |tool = Alchemy Engine |result = Dense Turf |dlc = Hamlet}} == {{pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * Due to their abundance and minimal use, [[Pine Cone]]s and [[Jungle Tree Seed]]s are good candidates to burn and get Ashes. * In DST, they can be farmed by setting a [[Mush Gnome]] on fire where it will spawn multiple Lunar Spores that will quickly burn and turn into Ashes. == {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets == Ashes Eaten.gif|eaten Ashes Disappear.gif|disappear == {{Pic32|Blueprint}} Gallery == CD_ash.png|Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from [[CD Don't Starve]].
